title: The people in the middle of GenAI adoption
description: GenAI adoption stalls not because people fear the technology, but because organisations keep solving the wrong problem — and each failed rollout consumes trust that won't replenish itself.

title: When Feedback Fails
description: More than a third of feedback interventions degrade performance — not because the intent was wrong, but because most organisations treat feedback as a free good and skip the four design conditions that determine whether it helps or hurts.

title: The Human Bottleneck
description: The constraint in AI-augmented work has already moved — not away from the technology, but onto the human who must direct, review, and judge what the machine produces.
